text:
Mad Scientist's Plastic Surgery マッド博士の整形マシーン - is a card found in the Greed Island game. It is one of the game's 100 designated slot cards and so is required for a player to complete the game. 
__NOTOC__

Summary

Mad Scientist's Plastic Surgery マッド博士の整形マシーン - This card allows the caster to bring forth the Mad Scientist's Plastic Surgery. When activated, it allows the user to scan in a picture of any face they want and you will have an exact likeness. This card carries a 5% chance of failure each and every time it's used. It also carries a 1% chance that the machine itself will break.

Card Description

{| class="article-table" style="height: 10px; color: #1A004C; background-color: #EEFFEE" cellspacing="0" cellpadding="0" border="0"
![Jap]
|No.072 :: マッド博士の整形マシーン 
なりたい顔の写真をインプットすればその通りに整形してくれる。何度でも手術可能だが、５％の確率で手術が失敗し、１％の確率でマシーンそのものが壊れる。
|-
![Eng]
|No.072 :: Mad Scientist's Plastic Surgery 
You can shape your body when you input a picture of a face you want to be. Surgery is as many times as you want, but each use carries 5% failure rate. The machine itself will break with 1% chance.
|}

Trivia

In Chapter 153, it is heavily implied that this is the card Genthru uses to change those hostages faces to look like Sub and Bara (to fool Team Tsezguerra).
